body_txt: Evil Overlords want to Take Over the World , and Omnicidal Maniacs want to destroy the world, but these villains just want to change the world. Rather than conquer it, blow it up, or kill everyone on it, they are much more content to simply turn it into the most horrible and messed up place possible — their own personal playground, in other words, where Evil is legal and good, which is dumb , is impermissible and bad . Villains who intend on this goal are likely Card-Carrying Villains doing it For the Evulz . Naturally, the common criminals who inhabit the world would like this guy, and they'll welcome him as their liberator. Compare Dystopia Justifies the Means , which is when a bad guy wants to make a deliberately oppressive government, Anarcho-Tyranny , where the tyrant is intentionally allowing or inducing some lawless anarchy for his advantage, and Infernal Paradise , where the hellish playground is rooted in Blue-and-Orange Morality rather than simple malice.
